message:
fix: Ctrl+[, Ctrl+], Ctrl+., Ctrl+R shortcuts now work

The Kitty keyboard protocol provides explicit modifier bits, so we no
longer convert Ctrl+key to .ctrl_* variants. Instead, we return .char
and let the normalizer use the modifiers directly.

This fixes:
- Ctrl+[ (go back) - was returning .none for non-letter Ctrl combos
- Ctrl+] (go forward) - same issue
- Ctrl+. (stop loading) - same issue
- Ctrl+R (reload) - was being treated as Cmd+R due to normalizeCtrlKey
